title: 1 Enoch (Ge'ez): The Book of the Watchers
description: The Book of Enoch — canonical in the Ethiopian Church, quoted in Jude. The Watchers descend from heaven, mate with human women, and produce the Nephilim giants.
introduction: The Book of Enoch — canonical in the Ethiopian Church, quoted in Jude. The Watchers descend from heaven, mate with human women, and produce the Nephilim giants.

translation.text: And it came to pass, when the children of men had multiplied, that in those days were born unto them beautiful daughters. And the Watchers, the children of heaven, saw and lusted after them, and said to one another: Come, let us choose wives from among the daughters of men.
